channel.title: Crowdlisten - Terry Chen
channel.description: Hi, this is Terry. I'm documenting my product ideas and learning notes in this blog. I'm interested in creating new user experiences through generative ai, focusing on synthesized content generation and actionable insight extraction.

image.title: Terry Chen
image.description: Hi, this is Terry. I'm documenting my product ideas and learning notes in this blog. I'm interested in creating new user experiences through generative ai, focusing on synthesized content generation and actionable insight extraction.

item.title: The Agent Economy, User Testing on Moltbook
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: A field report on agent painpoints and a broader thesis on the agent economy: from task execution to attention mediation and agent-operated demand.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: The Real-Time Feedback Layer: How Crowdlisten Closes the Loop Between Builders and Audiences
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Products are conversations, not launches. Crowdlisten is evolving from insight extraction into a real-time feedback layer that connects what builders ship with how audiences actually respond, creating continuous learning loops that compound over time and inform PRD decisions.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Feature Extraction Based on Multi-Modal Content Understanding
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Fine-grained social listening for understanding crowd conversations: a framework for turning fragmented, high-volume social discussion into weighted signal and agent-ready product action.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Building Has Become Easier — How Do We Fix Distribution?
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Notes from working with vibe-coded builders: shipping is fast, distribution is hard, and founder-led workflows are becoming the operating layer between product capability, PRD clarity, and adoption.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: The Agent Economy Starts with Tasks. It Scales Through Attention.
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Agents already execute workflows; the next shift is attention mediation. As discovery moves from humans to agents, product teams must design for agentic discovery workflows and agent-operated demand.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Google NotebookLM - Long Context Windows and Multimodality
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Exploring Google NotebookLM's approach to long context windows and multimodal AI interactions for research and knowledge management.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Weighing Social Interactions: Reconstructing Meaning from Large Multi-modal Datasets
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Technical analysis of AI-powered search systems and topic modeling approaches, exploring semantic retrieval, embedding spaces, and the challenges of modern web crawling.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: PM for Agents: Turning Audience Insight Into Agent-Ready Specs
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: CrowdListen converts raw user conversation into structured product insight and agent-ready PM specs, preserving intent from feedback signal to executable task.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Human-Mediated Agentic Workflows
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Explore the emerging landscape of agentic workforces - autonomous AI agents that reason, plan, act, and learn to handle complex tasks and workflows. Analysis of key players, technology strategies, and market opportunities.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Why People Care What Others Think
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Understanding collective intelligence and social dynamics. Why crowd psychology matters for product builders and how human need for belonging drives engagement patterns.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen
